choices.text: Sends SIGTERM to PID 1, waits grace period (default 10s), then SIGKILL if still alive. The app must handle SIGTERM to shut down gracefully — finish in-flight requests, close connections, exit. Apps that ignore it get killed hard. Configure grace with `-t SECONDS`; configure SIGTERM handling in your app.

questions.explanation: stop = SIGTERM + grace + SIGKILL. Graceful shutdown requires the app to handle SIGTERM.

questions.prompt: A production container disappears on host reboot. Restart policy?

choices.text: `--restart unless-stopped`. Survives daemon restarts and host reboots; doesn't restart if you explicitly `docker stop` it. For Kubernetes/Compose-managed services, set `no` and let the orchestrator handle restarts. For raw single-host Docker, unless-stopped is the default for production services.

questions.explanation: unless-stopped for single-host production; let orchestrator handle restarts when one exists.
